findings.description: CostDisplay component shows session total cost as a clickable badge that expands to show per-message cost breakdown with model name, input/output/cache token counts, and individual message costs
findings.evidence: CostDisplay.tsx: cost-badge button toggles cost-detail-panel with cost-session-total and per-message breakdown table

findings.description: CostSegment in status bar provides always-visible cost tracking
findings.evidence: StatusBar.tsx line 12: imports CostSegment, passes sessionTotalCost prop

findings.description: Cost tracking hook (useCostTracking) and pricing library exist with model-specific pricing
Cannot see live cost data on new chat screen as no messages have been sent yet. CostDisplay hides itself when messageCosts.length === 0 and sessionTotalCost === 0.
findings.evidence: CostDisplay.tsx lines 22-25: returns null when no costs
